mapper.insert: INSERT INTO delivery_notice_entry ( delivery_notice_id, delivery_notice_no, FID, FEntryID, FMaterialID, FMaterialName, FMateriaModel, FMateriaType, FUnitID, FQty, FStockID, FNoteEntry, FBaseUnitID, FBaseUnitQty, FDeliveryLoc, FDeliveryLAddress, FOrderNo, FOrderSeq, FCustMatID, FLot, FIsFree, FCustMatName, FRemainOutQty, FStockStatusId, FPriceUnitQty, FPrice, FTaxPrice, FTaxCombination, FEntryTaxRate, FPriceCoefficient, FSysPrice, FLimitDownPrice, FBefDisAmt, FBefDisAllAmt, FDiscountRate, F_ora_Decimal, F_ora_Decimal1, F_c, F_k, F_g, F_tj, F_mz, F_jz, F_mzz, F_xs, F_zxs, F_cgzj, F_zjzj, F_kpdj, F_kpzj, F_zwbgpm, F_ywbgpm, F_jzz, F_jcsj, F_khhh, F_sfbg, F_ddhsdj, F_tsl, F_bgdw, F_tcblNEW, F_BCFYNEW, F_GLBCFY, F_ffyq, Fddshrq, Fxsddh, Fxsddhh, Fbzgctg, Fypd, Fykc, F_cty_BaseProperty, Frkshrq, Fckshrq, F_BZFS, created_by, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{deliveryNoticeId}, #{deliveryNoticeNo}, #{FID}, #{FEntryID}, #{FMaterialID}, #{FMaterialName}, #{FMateriaModel}, #{FMateriaType}, #{FUnitID}, #{FQty}, #{FStockID}, #{FNoteEntry}, #{FBaseUnitID}, #{FBaseUnitQty}, #{FDeliveryLoc}, #{FDeliveryLAddress}, #{FOrderNo}, #{FOrderSeq}, #{FCustMatID}, #{FLot}, #{FIsFree}, #{FCustMatName}, #{FRemainOutQty}, #{FStockStatusId}, #{FPriceUnitQty}, #{FPrice}, #{FTaxPrice}, #{FTaxCombination}, #{FEntryTaxRate}, #{FPriceCoefficient}, #{FSysPrice}, #{FLimitDownPrice}, #{FBefDisAmt}, #{FBefDisAllAmt}, #{FDiscountRate}, #{F_ora_Decimal}, #{F_ora_Decimal1}, #{F_c}, #{F_k}, #{F_g}, #{F_tj}, #{F_mz}, #{F_jz}, #{F_mzz}, #{F_xs}, #{F_zxs}, #{F_cgzj}, #{F_zjzj}, #{F_kpdj}, #{F_kpzj}, #{F_zwbgpm}, #{F_ywbgpm}, #{F_jzz}, #{F_jcsj}, #{F_khhh}, #{F_sfbg}, #{F_ddhsdj}, #{F_tsl}, #{F_bgdw}, #{F_tcblNEW}, #{F_BCFYNEW}, #{F_GLBCFY}, #{F_ffyq}, #{Fddshrq}, #{Fxsddh}, #{Fxsddhh}, #{Fbzgctg}, #{Fypd}, #{Fykc}, #{F_cty_BaseProperty}, #{Frkshrq}, #{Fckshrq}, #{F_BZFS}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )

INSERT INTO delivery_notice_entry ( delivery_notice_id, delivery_notice_no, FEntryID, FMaterialID, FMaterialName, FMateriaModel, FMateriaType, FUnitID, FQty, FStockID, FNoteEntry, FBaseUnitID, FBaseUnitQty, FDeliveryLoc, FDeliveryLAddress, FOrderNo, FOrderSeq, FCustMatID, FLot, FIsFree, FCustMatName, FRemainOutQty, FStockStatusId, FPriceUnitQty, FPrice, FTaxPrice, FTaxCombination, FEntryTaxRate, FPriceCoefficient, FSysPrice, FLimitDownPrice, FBefDisAmt, FBefDisAllAmt, FDiscountRate, F_ora_Decimal, F_ora_Decimal1, F_c, F_k, F_g, F_tj, F_mz, F_jz, F_mzz, F_xs, F_zxs, F_cgzj, F_zjzj, F_kpdj, F_kpzj, F_zwbgpm, F_ywbgpm, F_jzz, F_jcsj, F_khhh, F_sfbg, F_ddhsdj, F_tsl, F_bgdw, F_tcblNEW, F_BCFYNEW, F_GLBCFY, F_ffyq, Fddshrq, Fxsddh, Fxsddhh, Fbzgctg, Fypd, Fykc, F_cty_BaseProperty, Frkshrq, Fckshrq, F_BZFS, created_by, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{entry.deliveryNoticeId}, #{entry.deliveryNoticeNo}, #{entry.FEntryID}, #{entry.FMaterialID}, #{entry.FMaterialName}, #{entry.FMateriaModel}, #{entry.FMateriaType}, #{entry.FUnitID}, #{entry.FQty}, #{entry.FStockID}, #{entry.FNoteEntry}, #{entry.FBaseUnitID}, #{entry.FBaseUnitQty}, #{entry.FDeliveryLoc}, #{entry.FDeliveryLAddress}, #{entry.FOrderNo}, #{entry.FOrderSeq}, #{entry.FCustMatID}, #{entry.FLot}, #{entry.FIsFree}, #{entry.FCustMatName}, #{entry.FRemainOutQty}, #{entry.FStockStatusId}, #{entry.FPriceUnitQty}, #{entry.FPrice}, #{entry.FTaxPrice}, #{entry.FTaxCombination}, #{entry.FEntryTaxRate}, #{entry.FPriceCoefficient}, #{entry.FSysPrice}, #{entry.FLimitDownPrice}, #{entry.FBefDisAmt}, #{entry.FBefDisAllAmt}, #{entry.FDiscountRate}, #{entry.F_ora_Decimal}, #{entry.F_ora_Decimal1}, #{entry.F_c}, #{entry.F_k}, #{entry.F_g}, #{entry.F_tj}, #{entry.F_mz}, #{entry.F_jz}, #{entry.F_mzz}, #{entry.F_xs}, #{entry.F_zxs}, #{entry.F_cgzj}, #{entry.F_zjzj}, #{entry.F_kpdj}, #{entry.F_kpzj}, #{entry.F_zwbgpm}, #{entry.F_ywbgpm}, #{entry.F_jzz}, #{entry.F_jcsj}, #{entry.F_khhh}, #{entry.F_sfbg}, #{entry.F_ddhsdj}, #{entry.F_tsl}, #{entry.F_bgdw}, #{entry.F_tcblNEW}, #{entry.F_BCFYNEW}, #{entry.F_GLBCFY}, #{entry.F_ffyq}, #{entry.Fddshrq}, #{entry.Fxsddh}, #{entry.Fxsddhh}, #{entry.Fbzgctg}, #{entry.Fypd}, #{entry.Fykc}, #{entry.F_cty_BaseProperty}, #{entry.Frkshrq}, #{entry.Fckshrq}, #{entry.F_BZFS}, #{entry.createdBy}, #{entry.createdAt}, #{entry.updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM delivery_notice_entry WHERE delivery_notice_id = #{deliveryNoticeId} ORDER BY FEntryID
SELECT * FROM delivery_notice_entry WHERE delivery_notice_no = #{deliveryNoticeNo} ORDER BY FEntryID
SELECT * FROM delivery_notice_entry WHERE FMaterialID = #{materialId} LIMIT 1
